name: Maple and Walnut Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the walnuts on a baking sheet and toast in the oven at 200°C/400°F/gas mark 6 for about 5 minutes until browned. Transfer to a wire sieve and shake off any loose, papery skin. Allow to cool and chop roughly.
2. Heat the maple syrup to boiling point. Meanwhile, whisk the egg white with salt until soft peaks form. Gradually pour in the very hot syrup while continuously whisking. Keep whisking until you have a thick, stiff meringue. Use an electric whisk if available. Let it cool slightly.
3. Beat the cream until stiff, then gently fold into the maple meringue. Fold in the chopped walnuts. Transfer to a dish and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
